sections.heading: ProcessTransformer: Predictive Business Process Monitoring with Transformer Network

figures.label: Fig. 1
figures.caption: Fig. 1. An example of Selfattention mechanism to learn attention representation vector of Ship product event.

figures.label: Fig. 2
figures.caption: Fig. 2. Model Architecture of Process Transformer.

figures.label: Fig. 3
figures.caption: Fig. 3. Illustration of self-attention mechanism on a trace. The model learns attention scores of events for solving a particular predictive monitoring task.

tables.label: Table 1
tables.caption: Table 1. Descriptive statistics of event logs used for evaluations. Time-related characteristics are reported in days.

tables.label: Table 2
tables.caption: Table 2. Performance evaluation scores of <sup>ProcessTransformer</sup> for nine event logs for three predictive monitoring tasks.

tables.label: Table 3
tables.caption: Table 3. Accuracy score (in %) and averaged scores across all datasets for next activity prediction task (Higher is better). The baseline scores for comparison are taken from [28].

tables.label: Table 4
tables.caption: Table 4. MAE (in days) and averaged scores across all datasets for event time prediction task (Lower is better). The baseline scores for comparison are taken from [28].

tables.label: Table 5
tables.caption: Table 5. MAE (in days) and averaged scores across all datasets for remaining time prediction task (Lower is better). The baseline scores for comparison are taken from [28].
